meta.title: THE FORGE — Build Discipline, Purpose and Direction
meta.description: A platform for men who choose to work on themselves. No noise, no validation — only discipline, clarity and real growth.
meta.ogDescription: A brotherhood of men building discipline, strength and purpose together.

hero.title: Most men won’t do the work. Will you?
hero.subtitle: You already know what you need to do. This is where you do it.

problem.title: THE PROBLEM
problem.intro: You know you could be doing more.
problem.imageAlt: Man reflecting, representing frustration and lack of direction

reality.title: The Reality Men Face Today
reality.intro: This isn’t just you. Millions of men are going through the same thing.
reality.stat1Desc: Nearly 80% of suicides worldwide are men.
reality.stat3Desc: A growing number of men report chronic loneliness.
reality.footnote: This is not random. This is a pattern.

solution.title: THE SOLUTION
solution.imageAlt: Men training together as a supportive community
solution.p1: You don’t need more information. You need structure.
solution.p2: You don’t need motivation. You need discipline.
solution.p3: This is where you build it.
solution.structureDesc: A system that keeps you consistent.
solution.brotherhoodDesc: Men who hold the same standard.
solution.guidanceDesc: Direction from those who’ve done it.

focusMode.title: FOCUS MODE
focusMode.intro: You don’t track habits here. You build discipline through action.

body.title: Body
body.desc: Train even when you don’t feel like it.

community.title: BROTHERHOOD
community.intro: No status. No validation. Just men working on themselves, together.

training.title: Training Groups
training.desc: Train with men who actually show up.

books.title: Knowledge & Discussions
books.desc: Turn what you learn into action.

life.title: Real Conversations
life.desc: Say what’s real. No filters. No pretending.

eventGroups.title: Events & Meetups
eventGroups.desc: Take it beyond the screen. Meet in real life.

supportCircles.title: Accountability
supportCircles.desc: Stay on track with men who hold the line.

business.title: Build & Collaborate
business.desc: Create something real with other men.

experts.title: GUIDANCE
experts.intro: No one will do the work for you. But you don’t have to figure it out alone.

mentors.title: Mentors
mentors.desc: Learn from men who’ve already done it.

events.title: REAL WORLD BROTHERHOOD
events.intro: This is where talk ends. This is where you show up.

bikers.title: Bikers Brotherhood
bikers.alt: Bikers Brotherhood meetup in New York

cta.title: Decide Who You’re Going to Become
cta.subtitle: You already know enough. Now it's time to act.

footer.tagline: You’ve seen the reality. Now act. This is on you.
